conflict: The couple needs ordinary logistical progress, but every service platform is nudging them back toward the same shared routine.
consequence: What looked like inconvenience becomes visible intervention: the household is being preserved by system logic, not chance.
must_land_beats: Apartment searches and moving quotes fail in ways that are too well timed to feel accidental.
The school custody app and transit credits only validate the preexisting family route.
A quiet breakfast with Leela makes the continuing resemblance to normal family life emotionally punishing.
By the end of the chapter, both adults suspect the household itself has been classified as something worth preserving.
pressure_source: The couple needs ordinary logistical progress, but every service platform is nudging them back toward the same shared routine.
state_shift: What looked like inconvenience becomes visible intervention: the household is being preserved by system logic, not chance.
